nasb.text: Assyria also has joined with them; They have become a help to the children of Lot. Selah.

esv.text: Asshur also has joined them; they are the strong arm of the children of Lot. Selah

cnv.text: 亞述也和他們聯合起來， 作了羅得子孫的幫手。

ccb.text: 亚述也跟他们勾结， 要助罗得的后代一臂之力。（细拉）

csbs.text: 亚述也与他们联合， 作罗得子孙的左膀右臂。细拉
